commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b86433ace2f18da7591b1a3df61c4eeb4fca6ee2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR exports the Anthropic API helper, changes replay-history sanitization to always strip invalid thinking signatures for Anthropic/Bedrock model APIs, and adds three sanitizer regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for both the reported sanitizer branch and the PR regression: current main skips `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` when `policy.preserveSignatures` is false, while the PR’s new `isAnthropicApi` gate would also match non-preserving `anthropic-messages` providers such as Kimi. I did not run a live interrupted Anthropic continuation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor/maintainer follow-up for signed-provider scope and real replay proof; ClawSweeper should not queue an automated repair because the external PR still needs proof from the contributor’s setup.

target.title: fix(memory): strip invalid thinking signatures for signed-thinking providers
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #84430 — incomplete thinking blocks (missing signature) persisted to session JSONL cause `Invalid signature in thinking block` on next request
- `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` was conditionally gated on `policy.preserveSignatures`, allowing unsigned thinking blocks to reach the Anthropic API on recovery paths where `preserveSignatures` is `false`
- Scoped the unconditional sanitizer to Anthropic and Bedrock providers (`isAnthropicApi`), which require signed thinking blocks for replay. Non-Anthropic providers remain gated by `policy.preserveSignatures` to avoid silently removing intentionally unsigned reasoning blocks.

## Changes

- `src/agents/transcript-policy.ts`: exported `isAnthropicApi` helper (previously private)
- `src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/replay-history.ts`: `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` now always runs for Anthropic/Bedrock providers; other providers keep the `policy.preserveSignatures` gate
- `src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`: 3 new regression tests covering the `preserveSignatures: false` path for Anthropic, Bedrock, and non-Anthropic providers

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Incomplete thinking blocks (missing/empty/blank signature) survive session replay sanitization when policy.preserveSignatures is false on Anthropic providers. The fix scopes unconditional `stripInvalidThinkingSignatures` to signed-thinking providers (Anthropic/Bedrock) so unsigned blocks are always stripped before reaching those APIs.

Real environment tested: macOS Darwin 25.4.0 (arm64), Node.js v24.14.1, OpenClaw 2026.5.19 (b86433a)

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/thinking.test.ts \
  src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts \
  src/agents/transcript-policy.test.ts
```

Evidence after fix:
```
 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  129 passed (129)
```

Including 3 new regression tests:
- `strips unsigned thinking blocks for anthropic api even when preserveSignatures is false` — verifies Anthropic always strips unsigned blocks regardless of policy
- `strips unsigned thinking for bedrock-converse-stream even when preserveSignatures is false` — same for Bedrock
- `preserves all thinking blocks for non-anthropic providers when preserveSignatures is false` — verifies non-Anthropic providers are NOT affected

Observed result after fix: 129 tests pass (27 thinking, 61 sanitize-session-history including 3 new, 41 transcript-policy). The sanitizer now unconditionally protects Anthropic/Bedrock replay from poisoned thinking blocks while preserving existing behavior for other providers.

What was not tested: Live Anthropic session takeover + continuation (requires live credentials and in-process stream interrupt orchestration); multi-turn session recovery from a JSONL corrupted before this patch (cross-version compat); providers other than anthropic-messages and bedrock-converse-stream that might also use signed thinking

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: nianjiuzst
